chain.thought: Explanation: The “threads per inch (tpi)” column lists counts per inch. Nominal sizes with at most 18 tpi (i.e., 18 or 16 tpi) include all except pg7 (20 tpi), giving 9 sizes in total.

judge_thought: Explanation: The phrase “at most a certain number per unit” refers to the “threads per inch (tpi)” column. Interpreting the threshold as 18 tpi, the nominal sizes with tpi ≤ 18 are: pg9, pg11, pg13.5, pg16 (all 18 tpi), and pg21, pg29, pg36, pg42, pg48 (all 16 tpi). That makes 9 nominal sizes in total.
